description: Participants predict whether a wearer is engaging in Body-Focused Repetitive Behaviors (BFRBs) using time-series data from a wrist-worn sensor. The task involves analyzing motion and physiological signals to classify behavioral states over time. Success is measured using a custom competition-specific metric (CMI_2025) on a held-out test set. Hosted by the Child Mind Institute, the competition focuses on health analytics and time series modeling.
